has errors and cannot be exported. Save the file before exporting.
Click Export to save a copy of the file and error logs as a ZIP file to send to support. Contact support
has errors and cannot be opened.
Click OK to open the file with warnings or click Export to save a copy of the file and error logs as a ZIP file to send to support. Contact support
has errors and will be opened with warnings.

Do one of the following:
  • Select Close File to discard changes and revert to the last saved version.
  • Click Cancel to continue working on the file to resolve the errors.
  • Select Export & Close File to save a copy of the file with the latest unsaved changes and error logs as a ZIP file to send to support. Contact support
could not be autosaved.
cannot be saved.

More Info
The EAGLE libraries have been successfully imported to use inside Fusion Electronics. They are available to use from the Library Manager when building Electronics Designs.
